---
name: "\U0001F31F Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement"
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. *"I'm frustrated when..."*

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear, concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific scenario where this would be useful. Which document type, app, or workflow does it improve?

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
